item.description:
# Clip 1.3.6
Clip 1.3.6 adds smoother, configurable cursor updates to Live Share.
## Live Share
- Add a **Match Cursor to Frame Rate** toggle to the active Live Share popover and the default Live Share settings. - Keep the existing 20 Hz cursor cadence when the option is disabled. - Follow 30 or 60 FPS stream cadence when enabled, while retaining a 20 Hz minimum for 15 FPS streams. - Apply changes immediately during an active share and remember the setting for future sessions. - Keep cursor messages ephemeral so stale positions are discarded under transport congestion instead of being queued.
This is an app-only update. The Live Share server and web viewer are unchanged.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
